/CAL:DISMISSAL OR SENTENCE/X:COURT ADMONISHES DEFENDANT THAT THE CRIMINALPROTECTIVE ORDER FILED 03-19-21, CONTINUES TO BE ACTIVE/CTORD:DEFENDANT HAS SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETED AND IS TERMINATED FROM THE  HARBOR LIGHTS RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/CONTD:POSSIBLE MODIFICATION OF CPO/DOP/
/CAL:PROGRAM PROGRESS REPORT/X:DEFENDANT HAS A POSITIVE REPORT FROM HARBORLIGHTS PROGRAM AS WELL AS THE DV PROGRAM/EMTERM/CONTD:HARBOR LIGHTS & DVPROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:FAVORABLE REPORT/

/CAL:REINSTATEMENT OF PROBATION & TRANSPORT TO PROGRAM/X:THE DEFENDANT, HAVING ALREADY ADMITTED THE VIOLATION OF PROPBATION ON 03-19-21, HAS AGREED TO THE FOLLOWING REINSTATEMENT OF HIS PROBATION/REVSA:08-26-20/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:84 DAYS/CTS:84/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE 6 MONTHS AT HARBOR LIGHTS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON ELECTRIC MONITORING BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY APD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED TODAY WITHCOORDINATED PICK-UP BY A REPRESENTATIVE FROM THE MAPS PROGRAM FOR TRANSPORTATION TO APD FOR THE  GPS THEN TO HARBOR LIGHTS PROGRAM/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE ON GPS FOR THE 1ST 3 MONTHS WHILE IN HARBOR LIGHTS, THEN HAVE THE DEVICE REMOVED AND THEN PUT BACK ON AGAIN (BY  APD) FOR THE 1ST 3 MONTHS AFTER RELEASE FROM THE PROGRAM/CTORD:IF THE DEFENDANT HAS BEEN 100% SUCCESSFUL AFTER 1 MONTH OUT OF PROGRAM, THE COURT WILL ENTERTAIN A MOTION TO RELIEVE THE DEFENDANT OF HIS GPS REQUIREMENT/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT SHALL NOT VIOLATE HIS PREVIOUSLY FILED CPO (03-19-21) IN ANY WAY/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT SHALL NOT PICK UP ANY NEW CASES/CTORD:IF THE DEFENDANT VIOLATES THE CPO OR FAILS TO SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETE HARBOR LIGHTS, THE SENTENCE OF 1 YEAR IN COUNTY(WITH CREDITS FROM TIME IN HARBOR LIGHTS) SHALL BE IMPOSED/CTROD:ANY OTHER VIOLATION OF THIS PROPOSED RESOLUTION WILL NOT AUTOMATICALLY TRIGGER THEAFOREMENTIONED HAMMER/PROB EXT:04-08-22/4019HALF/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT ON04-28-21/DOPU:APD/CONTD:TO DISMISS OR SENTENCE ON 09-23-21/SOP/

/CAL:POSSIBLE ADMISSION/MTR-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/SA1:LESLIE BLUEFORD& LONZO ERWIN/SA2:802 LIBSON ST, SF CA/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:SENTENCING & REINSTATEMENT OF PROBATION & TRANSPORT TO TREATMENT/DOP/

/CAL:DEFENSE BAIL & RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM MOTION & CONFIRM APD MTRHEARING DATE/CTOTRD:THE BAIL MOTION IS DENIED/X:THE COURT CONFIRMS THE MTR HEARING DATE OF 02-19-21/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:APD MTR FILING/09    CTS APD MTR/WIAMTR/S50/PROB ADM REV/SHER/BAIL:150000/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE ON BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ONPRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITHA GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1:LESLIE BLUEFORD; LONZO E/SA2:807 LISBON ST SF CA 94112/SAORD3/SAORD/VD:01-28-21 DATE/CONTD:PHC ON APD MTR 01-22-21/CONTD:APD MTR HEARING 02-19-21/DOP/
